title: Aesthetic Tables
description: Aesthetic Tables adds beautifully crafted tables in various styles and wood types, perfect for decorating interiors, furnishing builds, and enhancing roleplay in Minecraft.
body:
**Aesthetic Tables** is a Minecraft mod focused on bringing high-quality, stylish tables to your world. From simple wooden dining tables to elegant corner pieces, this mod introduces a variety of connectable, multi-block table designs that are both functional and decorative.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f22bf4b6b7521ea6332b38cc0e7338c7b830259e.png)

Tables automatically connect and adapt to their surroundings—forming long banquet tables, L-shaped corners, or standalone furniture depending on placement. The modular system is flexible, allowing you to build tables of any shape or size that feel right at home in cottages, castles, cafes, and everything in between.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da02c4594537b37c985a31951f07d1973006eb2d.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7295654e3b4b43df981e1b777a043ac2c03aed48.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f9eac79b7468e047fbc107a90dd494fa85b51eb.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73c8ac3903d382863484a4bb35cde7b7bd4d8cb.png)

### 🛠️ Current Features:
- Tables for every vanilla wood type
- Full support for custom woods from Arboreal Nature and Wild Fields
- Smart auto-connecting system for multi-block layouts (center, sides, corners, etc.)
- Detailed models and textures designed to match various interior styles
- Survival-friendly recipes that blend seamlessly with vanilla progression
- Creative inventory grouping for easy access in building and decorating

### 🧩 Planned Features and Future Updates:
- Stone, metal, and decorative themed tables (e.g., rustic, ornate, modern)
- Tablecloths, placemats, or centerpieces as additional decorative layers
- Functional tables (e.g., crafting or interaction in future optional modules)

Whether you're furnishing a cozy inn, hosting a feast in a grand hall, or adding detail to a family kitchen, Aesthetic Tables helps bring life and purpose to every room.

**Design with structure. Decorate with purpose.**
